info.title: TVMaze API
info.description: A free, fast and clean REST API for TV information. Returns JSON and conforms to HATEOAS and HAL principles. Rate limited to 20 calls per 10 seconds per IP address. Licensed under CC BY-SA.

get.description: Search through all shows by name using a fuzzy algorithm (fuzziness value of 2). Results are ordered by relevancy.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: The query string to search for.

200.description: An array of show search results ordered by relevancy.

get.description: Returns exactly one result or no result at all. Uses a fuzziness of 1 to reduce false positives. Supports embedding additional information.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: The query string to search for.

200.description: Full show information for the single best match.

get.description: Find a show by its TheTVDB, IMDB, or TVRage ID. Returns a 301 redirect to the show's URL if matched, or 404 if not found.

parameters.name: thetvdb
parameters.description: The TheTVDB ID of the show.

parameters.name: imdb
parameters.description: The IMDB ID of the show (e.g. tt0944947).

parameters.name: tvrage
parameters.description: The TVRage ID of the show.

301.description: Redirect to the show's canonical URL.

Location.description: The canonical URL of the matched show.

get.description: Search through all people in the database by name using the same fuzzy mechanism as show search.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: The query string to search for.

200.description: An array of person search results ordered by relevancy.

get.description: A complete list of episodes airing in a given country on a given date. Includes only network-tied episodes (not global streaming channels like Netflix). Episodes returned in air order with full show info.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: ISO 3166-1 country code. Defaults to US. Note: use GB for the United Kingdom.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: ISO 8601 formatted date. Defaults to the current day.

200.description: Array of schedule episodes with embedded show information.

get.description: A complete list of episodes airing on web/streaming channels on a given date. Omit country to get both local and global web channels. Set country to ISO code for local only. Set country to empty string for global only.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: ISO 3166-1 country code. Omit for all channels; empty string for global only.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: ISO 8601 formatted date. Defaults to the current day.

200.description: Array of web schedule episodes with embedded show information.

get.description: A list of all future episodes known to TVmaze, regardless of country. Response is at least several MB large. Results are cached for 24 hours.

200.description: Array of all future episodes with embedded show information.

get.description: A paginated list of all shows in the database with all primary information. 250 results per page. Pagination is ID-based, not offset-based. Results cached up to 24 hours.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: 0-based page number. Each page contains up to 250 shows.

200.description: Array of shows for the requested page.

get.description: Retrieve all primary information for a given show. Supports embedding additional information.
A complete list of episodes for a show in airing order with full episode information. Specials excluded by default.

parameters.name: specials
parameters.description: Set to 1 to include specials in the list.

get.description: Alternate episode lists for this show, for example DVD ordering.
Retrieve one specific episode from this show given its season and episode numbers.

parameters.name: season
parameters.description: The season number.

parameters.name: number
parameters.description: The episode number within the season.

get.description: Retrieve all episodes from a show that have aired on a specific date. Useful for daily shows.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: ISO 8601 formatted date.

200.description: Array of episode objects aired on the given date.

get.description: A complete list of seasons for the given show in ascending order.
A list of main cast for a show. Each item is a combination of a person and a character, ordered by importance (total appearances).
A list of main crew for a show. Each item is a combination of a person and their crew type.
A list of AKAs (aliases) for a show. A null country indicates the AKA is in the show's original country.
A list of all images available for this show. Image types: poster, banner, background, typography, or null for legacy unclassified images.
Retrieve an alternate episode list by its ID. Supports embedding alternateepisodes.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The TVmaze ID of the alternate list.

get.description: Retrieve all alternate episodes for a given alternate list. Supports embedding episodes.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The TVmaze ID of the alternate list.

get.description: A list of episodes in this season, always including specials. Supports embedding additional information (e.g. guestcast).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The TVmaze ID of the season.

get.description: Retrieve all primary information for a given episode. Supports embedding additional information (e.g. show).
Retrieve all guest cast starring in a given episode.
Retrieve all guest crew working on a given episode.
A paginated list of all people in the database. Up to 1000 results per page. Same pagination mechanism as the show index.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: 0-based page number.

get.description: Retrieve all primary information for a given person. Supports embedding additional information (e.g. castcredits).
Retrieve all show-level cast credits for a person. A cast credit is a combination of a show and a character. Supports embedding show and/or character.
Retrieve all show-level crew credits for a person. A crew credit is a combination of a show and a crew type. Supports embedding show.
Retrieve all episode-level guest cast credits for a person. A guest cast credit is a combination of an episode and a character. Supports embedding episode and/or character.

200.description: Array of guest cast credit objects.

get.description: A map of all shows and their last-updated timestamps. Updating any direct or indirect child (e.g. episodes, gallery items) also marks the show updated. Can be filtered by time period.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Filter to shows updated in the given period.

200.description: Object mapping show IDs (as string keys) to Unix timestamps of last update.

get.description: A map of all people and their last-updated timestamps. A person is updated when their attributes change or when a cast/crew credit is created or deleted.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Filter to people updated in the given period.

200.description: Object mapping person IDs (as string keys) to Unix timestamps of last update.

ShowId.name: id
ShowId.description: The TVmaze ID of the show.

EpisodeId.name: id
EpisodeId.description: The TVmaze ID of the episode.

PersonId.name: id
PersonId.description: The TVmaze ID of the person.

EmbedParam.name: embed
EmbedParam.description: Embed related resources in the response. Use array syntax (embed[]=episodes&embed[]=cast) for multiple. Common values: episodes, cast, crew, guestcast, nextepisode, previousepisode, show, seasons, akas, images, castcredits, crewcredits, alternateepisodes, character.

NotFound.description: The requested resource was not found.

TooManyRequests.description: Rate limit exceeded (20 calls per 10 seconds per IP).

UpdatesMap.description: A map of resource ID (string) to Unix timestamp (integer) of last update.

ImageSet.description: A set of image URLs in different sizes.

Image.description: A full image entry for a show.

type.description: The image type, or null for legacy unclassified images.

main.description: Whether this is the primary image of the given type.

_embedded.description: Embedded sub-resources, present only when using the embed parameter.

ShowSearchResult.description: A single show search result with a relevancy score.

PersonSearchResult.description: A single person search result with a relevancy score.

Character.description: A fictional character portrayed in a show.

self.description: Whether the person appears as themselves.

voice.description: Whether this is a voice-only role.

CastMember.description: A cast item: a person paired with a character they portray.

CrewMember.description: A crew item: a person paired with their crew role.

CastCredit.description: A show-level cast credit for a person.

_embedded.description: Embedded show and/or character when embed parameter is used.

CrewCredit.description: A show-level crew credit for a person.

_embedded.description: Embedded show when embed parameter is used.

GuestCastCredit.description: An episode-level guest cast credit for a person.

_embedded.description: Embedded episode and/or character when embed parameter is used.

AKA.description: An alternative name (alias) for a show.

AlternateList.description: An alternate episode ordering list (e.g. DVD order).

dvdRelease.description: Whether this is a DVD release ordering.

AlternateEpisode.description: An episode entry within an alternate list.
